title: Link layer include path does not match oscore/aes_ccm.h includes
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_tx.c:22, lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_rx.c:22, and lichen/subsys/lichen/link/link_nonce.h:15 include "oscore/aes_ccm.h". The only matching header is lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/aes_ccm.h, but lichen/subsys/lichen/link/CMakeLists.txt:30-31 adds /../oscore as the include directory. That path would satisfy "aes_ccm.h", not "oscore/aes_ccm.h".\n\nImpact: CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK builds depend on a sibling private OSCORE helper but the include contract and CMake path disagree, so link-layer compilation can fail before the OSCORE subsystem is even involved. Make the include spelling and exported include directory agree, or move the AES-CCM helper behind a public/shared include path.
close_reason: Completed: aligned link-layer AES-CCM includes with existing ../oscore include directory
